Jinsi ya Kucheza Aviator kwenye Golden Crown
How do I get the welcome bonus?

Golden Crown Aviator is Spribe's crash game hosted at Golden Crown Casino. A small plane takes off, the multiplier grows, and you decide when to cash out. The earlier you leave the round, the safer the win; if you wait too long and the plane disappears, the whole bet is lost.

Golden Crown Aviator ni mchezo wa crash wa Spribe unaopangishwa kwenye Golden Crown Casino. Ndege ndogo huondoka, multiplier inakua, na wewe unaamua lini kufanya Cash Out. Ukiondoka mapema, ushindi ni salama zaidi; ukisubiri sana na ndege haitoweki, dau lote linapotea.
Golden Crown is a crypto-friendly online casino operated by Hollycorn N.V. under a Curacao licence. The site focuses on slots, table games, and instant titles such as Aviator.
Golden Crown ni kasino ya mtandaoni inayokubali crypto inayoendeshwa na Hollycorn N.V. chini ya leseni ya Curacao. Tovuti inalenga slots, michezo ya meza, na michezo ya papo hapo kama Aviator.
Slots, live casino, Aviator and more
Slots, kasino ya live, Aviator na zaidi
To bet real money in Aviator you need a Golden Crown account.
Ili kuweka dau kwa pesa halisi kwenye Aviator unahitaji akaunti ya Golden Crown.
Open the official Golden Crown website and click Sign Up.
Fungua tovuti rasmi ya Golden Crown na ubofye Jisajili.
Enter your details - add email, create a password, and choose your country and currency.
Weka maelezo yako - ongeza barua pepe, unda nenosiri, na uchague nchi na sarafu yako.
Complete the form - fill in the required personal details exactly as they appear on your ID.
Kamilisha fomu - jaza maelezo ya kibinafsi yanayohitajika kama yalivyo kwenye kitambulisho chako.
Verify the account - confirm your email if the site requests it.
Thibitisha akaunti - thibitisha barua pepe yako ikiwa tovuti inaomba.
After that you can log in with your email and password, deposit, and open Aviator from the games lobby.
Baada ya hapo unaweza kuingia kwa barua pepe na nenosiri lako, kuweka amana, na kufungua Aviator kutoka lobby ya michezo.
Golden Crown uses standard casino bonuses that can apply while you play Aviator, subject to the current terms and wagering rules.
Golden Crown inatumia bonasi za kawaida za kasino zinazoweza kutumika unapocheza Aviator, kulingana na masharti ya sasa na sheria za wagering.
First deposit, free spins credited in batches
Amana ya kwanza, free spins zinakopwa kwa makundi
Bila wagering au wagering ya chini
On net losses over the period
Extra funds and spins for Aviator sessions
Fedha na spins za ziada kwa vikao vya Aviator
Log in to your Golden Crown account.
Ingia kwenye akaunti yako ya Golden Crown.
Deposit using card, e-wallet, or crypto.
Weka amana kwa kutumia kadi, pochi ya kielektroniki, au crypto.
Search for Aviator in the casino lobby and open the game.
Tafuta Aviator kwenye lobby ya kasino na ufungue mchezo.
Set the bet and confirm it before the round starts; you can place one or two bets.
Weka dau na uthibitishe kabla raundi haijaanza; unaweza kuweka dau moja au mbili.
Watch the round and cash out when the multiplier looks good enough for you.
Fuata raundi na ufanye Cash Out multiplier inapofaa kwako.

Golden Crown is run by Hollycorn N.V., registered in Curacao, and holds a licence from the Curacao Gaming Control Board. The casino uses encryption for payments and personal data. Aviator is based on RNG, so every round is independent and cannot be predicted.

Golden Crown inaendeshwa na Hollycorn N.V., iliyosajiliwa Curacao, na inashikilia leseni kutoka Curacao Gaming Control Board. Kasino inatumia usimbaji fiche kwa malipo na data ya kibinafsi. Aviator inategemea RNG, kwa hiyo kila raundi ni huru na haiwezi kutabiriwa.
It is the Aviator crash game available at Golden Crown Casino where you bet on a growing multiplier and cash out before the plane leaves the screen.
Ni mchezo wa crash Aviator unaopatikana kwenye Golden Crown Casino ambapo unaweka dau kwenye multiplier inayokua na kufanya Cash Out kabla ndege haijaondoka kwenye skrini.
Register, make a qualifying first deposit, and the 100% bonus up to $1000 plus free spins will be added according to the current terms.
Jisajili, weka amana ya kwanza inayostahiki, na bonasi ya 100% hadi $1000 pamoja na free spins itaongezwa kulingana na masharti ya sasa.
Golden Crown usually offers demo versions of many games. If demo is available for Aviator, you can use it to learn the mechanics without risking money.
Golden Crown kwa kawaida inatoa matoleo ya demo ya michezo mingi. Ikiwa demo inapatikana kwa Aviator, unaweza kuitumia kujifunza mechanics bila hatari ya pesa.
The casino operates under an international licence and follows standard KYC and security practices. Always check local laws before playing.
Kasino inafanya kazi chini ya leseni ya kimataifa na inafuata taratibu za kawaida za KYC na usalama. Angalia kila wakati sheria za ndani kabla ya kucheza.
Responsible gaming: Independent platform. Play only where legal.
Kubeti kwa uwajibikaji: Jukwaa huru. Cheza tu pale halali.
